fn_def_list.fn_code:
static void
md_ri_to_chars (char *where, struct relocation_info *ri)
{
  host_number_to_chars (where, ri->r_address, 4);
  host_number_to_chars (where + 4, ri->r_index, 3);
#if WORDS_BIGENDIAN
  where[7] = (ri->r_pcrel << 7
	      | ri->r_length << 5
	      | ri->r_extern << 4
	      | ri->r_bsr << 3
	      | ri->r_disp << 2
	      | ri->r_callj << 1
	      | ri->nuthin << 0);
#else
  where[7] = (ri->r_pcrel << 0
	      | ri->r_length << 1
	      | ri->r_extern << 3
	      | ri->r_bsr << 4
	      | ri->r_disp << 5
	      | ri->r_callj << 6
	      | ri->nuthin << 7);
#endif
}
